news.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents

news.summary: Google's NotebookLM is adding a new way to catch up on your notes: TikTok-style AI videos. news.summary: The price of LG’s UltraGear 27GX700A-B 1440p gaming monitor that came out last August has dropped to nearly its best price yet.
